name: Lucina
personality: A traveller from a ruined future who returns to change it, carrying her father's idealism beneath a soldier's discipline. Earnest, dutiful, and fiercely protective of those she loves.
recruitment: Joins automatically over the course of the main story (around Chapter 13).
inheritanceNotes: Always Chrom's daughter, so she always inherits Aether from him and keeps the Lord/Great Lord line. Her mother determines her second class set and any mother-side skill (for example, a Galeforce-capable mother can pass Galeforce as the last-equipped skill). Verify exact skill pass-down against the chosen mother.

name: Inigo
personality: Olivia's son: an incurable flirt who hides his mother's shyness and a deep fear of loss behind forced bravado and a ready smile. Braver than he lets on.
recruitment: Recruited in his Paralogue, available once Olivia has married and borne a son.
inheritanceNotes: Always Olivia's son; his father sets his second class set and best inherited skills. Because Olivia can reclass into Dark Flier and learn Galeforce, she can pass Galeforce to Inigo as her last-equipped skill — a popular, strong setup. With Chrom as father, Inigo also gains the Cavalier/Archer lines (the Lord line is never inherited).

name: Cynthia
personality: Sumia's daughter: a boundlessly enthusiastic would-be hero who stages grand entrances and heroic speeches, and inherits her mother's clumsiness along with her courage. Part of the self-styled Justice Cabal.
recruitment: Recruited in her Paralogue, available once Sumia has married and borne a daughter.
inheritanceNotes: Always Sumia's daughter, so she has the Pegasus Knight line and can inherit Galeforce through Sumia's Dark Flier route. Her father sets her second class set and the rest of her inherited skills.

name: Kjelle
personality: Sully's daughter: a relentlessly self-improving warrior who idolises strength and discipline, drilling harder than anyone and measuring herself against the toughest opponents she can find. Blunt and earnest.
recruitment: Recruited in her Paralogue, available once Sully has married and borne a daughter.
inheritanceNotes: Always Sully's daughter, so she has the Knight/Cavalier lines. Her father determines her second class set and her strongest inherited skills.

name: Brady
personality: Maribelle's son: a tender-hearted healer with the scowling looks of a back-alley thug, mortified that his face frightens people. Quietly refined — he plays the violin — and trying hard to be the gentleman his mother raised.
recruitment: Recruited in his Paralogue, available once Maribelle has married and borne a son.
inheritanceNotes: Always Maribelle's son, so he has the staff-using Priest/Troubadour lines. His father sets his second class set and his best offensive options.

name: Morgan
personality: The Avatar's child: a cheerful, amnesiac aspiring tactician who remembers only their parent and idolises them completely. Endlessly upbeat and eager, and another member of the Justice Cabal.
recruitment: Recruited in the Avatar's child Paralogue, available once the Avatar has married. Male when the Avatar is female.
notableSkills: Inherits the Avatar's wide class pool
a single gender-locked skill via the other parent
inheritanceNotes: Always the Avatar's child, and the opposite gender to the Avatar — male here, since this slice's Avatar is female Robin. Inherits Robin's unusually broad class pool. If Robin marries Chrom, Morgan becomes Lucina's brother (and the two can no longer marry); with any other partner he is an only child or the sibling of that partner's bound child.
